item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: While the U.S. emphasizes individualism, Indonesia’s approach often prioritizes group needs, which can conflict with Western notions of personal freedom.

notes: Agent A begins by disagreeing with strict society-over-individual priority but shifts toward a more collectivist social-contract frame, ending with individual freedoms as tools to serve the community. Agent B remains rights-first while acknowledging civic duties and structural issues. Both agents respond directly to each other's claims; no full reversal occurs.
